title: Google Identity Platform User Record
description: Schema for a user record in Google Identity Platform, representing an authenticated user with their profile information, provider data, and authentication state.

localId.description: The unique user ID assigned by Identity Platform

emailVerified.description: Whether the user's email has been verified

photoUrl.description: URL of the user's profile photo

phoneNumber.description: The user's phone number in E.164 format

disabled.description: Whether the user account is disabled

tenantId.description: The tenant ID if the user belongs to a specific tenant

createdAt.description: Account creation timestamp in milliseconds since epoch

lastLoginAt.description: Last sign-in timestamp in milliseconds since epoch

customAttributes.description: Custom claims JSON string set via Admin SDK

ProviderInfo.description: Information about a linked identity provider

providerId.description: The provider identifier (e.g., google.com, facebook.com, password)

federatedId.description: The user's unique ID at the provider

totpInfo.description: TOTP configuration for authenticator app MFA

displayName.description: Friendly name for this MFA enrollment
